openMinipayDesc: Semelo runs inside the MiniPay wallet. Open this link in MiniPay to start earning real cUSD.
nothingToClaim: Watch more videos to start earning
noEarningsDesc: Watch videos to start earning cUSD
errorDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
heroSub: Semelo rewards your attention with real money on the Celo blockchain.
step1Desc: Pick a short sponsored video and watch at least 80% of it.
step2Desc: cUSD rewards are credited to your wallet instantly after each video.
step3Desc: Tap Claim to transfer your earned cUSD on-chain, no gas needed.
connectDesc: Videos play for everyone — connect to track earnings and claim rewards.
